question: Generate comprehensive portfolio rebalancing recommendation orchestrating stock research, risk analysis, tax optimization, and trade execution planning across multiple MCP servers.
description: Comprehensive portfolio rebalancing with tax optimization, sector rotation, and risk management - full workflow orchestration

evaluation_criteria.multi_objective_optimization: Balance allocation, tax efficiency, and risk management
evaluation_criteria.calculation_accuracy: Correct calculations for tax, allocation, risk metrics
evaluation_criteria.constraint_compliance: Respect max allocation, min trade size, wash sale rules
evaluation_criteria.sector_rotation_validity: Appropriate sector recommendations for economic cycle
evaluation_criteria.reporting_completeness: Generate all tracking materials (sheets, PDF, calendar)

test_data_note: Ultimate complexity - tests full investment workflow end-to-end with 5+ MCP servers

output_format.description: Return valid JSON with flat structure

example.execution_summary: Rebalanced portfolio to target allocation with tax optimization
